blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (last score: 88). Defects: Imagery is minimal and not very attention-grabbing; mostly text-based layout; Some spacing under job titles and interview locations could be improved for breathing room; The headline could be slightly more emphasized relative to the subtext; Imagery is minimal and uninspiring; lacks attention-stopping visuals compared to typical Gulf recruitment ads; Some text blocks could have slightly better spacing for breathing room; The design is conservative and clean but could improve visual engagement; Visual hierarchy is somewhat flat; the headline could have stronger emphasis to better stop attention.; The ad is very text-heavy with minimal imagery, which may affect immediate engagement on social platforms.; Spacing between some sections could be improved for better visual separation and flow.; QR code integration is good but could be slightly larger or more visually integrated to enhance scanning prominence.

The headline could be slightly more emphasized relative to the subtext
